seoTitle: Cadello vs Cairnlea — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Cadello and Cairnlea. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cadello and Cairnlea.
heading: Cadello vs Cairnlea — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cadello, Victoria and Cairnlea, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cadello has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Cairnlea (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cadello or Cairnlea safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cadello has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Cairnlea scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cadello scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Cairnlea scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cadello or Cairnlea?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cadello has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
